incidents.sop_step: Install the front chassis pin: verify correct type and length (silver), insert through the aligned bores and push to a full seat with correct head orientation.
incidents.severity_reason: The reversed pin orientation may cause quality degradation but does not pose an immediate safety or functional failure risk.
incidents.incident_summary: During the installation of the front chassis pin, the pin was fully seated but oriented with the head reversed contrary to the SOP. This deviation is a known error mode that can affect product quality and has previously escaped automated visual inspection.
incidents.recommended_action: Notify the supervisor to review the incident and consider process improvements to detect reversed pin orientation.

incidents.sop_step: Install the rear chassis: align both LONG braces to the rear interface of the base and fit until bores align.
incidents.severity_reason: Incorrect brace installation can lead to functional failure of the chassis assembly if not corrected.
incidents.incident_summary: The worker installed short braces instead of the required long braces during the rear chassis installation step. This deviation from the SOP compromises the structural integrity and alignment of the chassis, potentially causing assembly issues or failure in later stages.
incidents.recommended_action: Notify the QA manager immediately to review the assembly and replace the incorrect braces with the correct long braces.

incidents.sop_step: Install the rear-rear chassis pin: verify the pin, insert through the rearmost bore position and push to a full seat.
incidents.severity_reason: An unverified failure to properly install the rear-rear chassis pin could cause functional failure of the chassis assembly.
incidents.incident_summary: The step to install the rear-rear chassis pin could not be verified because the rearmost bore was occluded by the worker's hand and brace edge, preventing confirmation of full seat and correct orientation. If the pin is not fully seated or incorrectly oriented, it may compromise the structural integrity and function of the chassis.
incidents.recommended_action: Re-record from a clearer angle or physically inspect the pin installation to confirm compliance.

history.action: Review item created by system (Agent 2 unable to verify)
